archive.archive_note: You are currently viewing old tasks

infopop.description: Work collaboratively with others and keep track of everything.

sections.title: Tasks
sections.text: Anyone with an account can add a task. Whether it's a homework assignment, Dalton task, or exam – anything you need to keep track of for school can be uploaded. All tasks are public and visible at any time, so you can track together with others.

sections.title: Adding tasks
sections.text: To add a task, click the + and select the type. Homework, Dalton tasks, and exams are always public; private tasks are encrypted and only visible to you. Fill out the form and select the subject and due date. Optionally, related images can be uploaded such as board photos, model solutions, notes, study sheets, etc.

sections.title: Uploading images
sections.text: Images can also be uploaded to other people's tasks if relevant; click the 3-dot menu, select Upload images and choose the desired images. To remove your own images, hold the image pressed or right-click on your image and select Delete from the menu.

sections.title: Tracking completed tasks
sections.text: If you have an account, you can check off any task you've completed using the checkbox. Your progress is saved in the cloud and the task is minimized to make room for open tasks. This way you can immediately see what you still need to do.

sections.title: Personalized courses
sections.text: If you've saved which courses/electives you're enrolled in on your account, you can automatically hide tasks for other subjects. You can adjust your selection in your account settings. If you still want to see all tasks, you can also disable this option in your account settings.

sections.title: Archive
sections.text: Tasks older than 24 hours are automatically hidden to keep the view tidy. If you're looking for an older task, you can click the Archive button and view tasks up to 30 days old.

double_task_confirm.title: Task Already Exists?
double_task_confirm.message: On {date} there is already a {type} registered for the subject {subject}. Are you sure your task isn't about the same task?

private_tasks.delete_confirm: Do you really want to delete this private task?

sections.title: Only visible to you
sections.text: Unlike regular tasks, these are encrypted and only visible to you. This way you can also track personal tasks and to-dos – all within one app.

sections.title: Security
sections.text: Thanks to AES-256 encryption you don't need to worry about unwanted readers: only your password can be used to access your private tasks.

infopop.tooltip: Overview and features for private tasks

private_tasks.requires_account: You must be logged in to use private tasks.
